attributes.description: Alerts when transaction rollback-rate exceeds 5% of total transactions. Poison messages or processing failures.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] High transaction rollback ratio

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ high transaction rollback ratio

### What fired
`rollback / (commit + rollback) > 5%` over the window.

### Why it matters
High rollback rates signal poison messages repeatedly failing processing, auth changes breaking apps, or consumer bugs.

### Triage
1. Check dead-letter / backout queues for accumulating messages.
2. Inspect consumer application logs.
3. Look at BOTHRESH / BOQNAME queue attributes.

### Remediation
- Route poison messages to BOQNAME.
- Fix consumer logic.

### Tuning
- 5% threshold with minimum commit rate filter; tighten to 1% for critical apps.
